response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is significantly overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with a decade of senior engineering leadership and multiple founder/staff engineer roles, suggesting misalignment with the entry-level scope and high on-site requirement; also, their resume name (Aisha Okonkwo) conflicts with all contact details and URLs under 'Szabo Bogdan', raising serious credibility concerns.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise across multiple production systems
Proven full-stack experience with React, REST APIs, and PostgreSQL alternatives
Strong open-source contributions and architectural thinking in distributed systems
concerns: Resume name and contact info mismatch suggests possible fraud or severe data error
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior roles, unlikely to accept junior-level responsibility
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Berlin
